name: Dylan Moran
bio: Dylan Moran is an Irish comedian, writer, actor and artist known for rambling, surreal observational stand-up delivered in a dishevelled, wine-soaked persona. He won the Perrier Comedy Award in 1996 and co-created and starred in the Channel 4 sitcom Black Books. He has also appeared in films including Shaun of the Dead and Run Fatboy Run.

timeline.ev: Begins stand-up at Dublins Comedy Cellar
Wins the So You Think Youre Funny award at the Edinburgh Festival
Wins the Perrier Comedy Award at the Edinburgh Festival
Co-creates and stars in the sitcom Black Books on Channel 4
Appears in Shaun of the Dead and tours the Monster shows
Voted the 14th greatest stand-up comedian in a Channel 4 poll

accolades: So You Think Youre Funny award (1993)
Two BAFTAs for the sitcom Black Books
